game.path: ./Star Wars Jedi Knight - Dark Forces II.sh
game.name: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II
game.desc: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II is a 1997 first-person action game developed and published by LucasArts. Play as Kyle Katarn, a mercenary turned Jedi, battling the Dark Jedi Jerec across seven episodes with lightsaber combat, Force powers, and multiplayer support.
